name: jarvis-agent-desktop
description: Local-first Electron desktop AI environment with FastAPI, Google ADK, MCP tooling, and NBAM memory.

scripts.backend:dev: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765
scripts.backend:lint: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.validate: npm run desktop:typecheck && npm run backend:test
